title: Your Sunscreen Passed FDA Safety Review. The FDA Never Actually Did One.
description: The FDA's own clinical trials confirmed that chemical sunscreen ingredients enter the bloodstream at concentrations that trigger mandatory safety review â and then nothing happened. Manufacturers never submitted the required toxicology data. The FDA kept approving the products anyway. This is the story of a regulatory system that asked the right question, got an alarming answer, and quietly moved on.
heroImageAlt: Editorial illustration for Your Sunscreen Passed FDA Safety Review. The FDA Never Actually Did One.
